title: Run high-performance computing (HPC) applications on Azure
summary: Azure HPC is a purpose-built cloud capability for HPC & AI workload, using leading-edge processors and HPC-class InfiniBand interconnect, to deliver the best application performance, scalability, and value. Azure HPC enables users to unlock innovation, productivity, and business agility, through a highly available range of HPC & AI technologies that can be dynamically allocated as your business and technical needs change. This learning path is a series of modules that help you get started on Azure HPC - you can choose topics you are most interested in or progress through each of them one by one.

sections.title: Run high-performance computing (HPC) applications on Azure
sections.summary: Azure HPC is a purpose-built cloud capability for HPC & AI workload, using leading-edge processors and HPC-class InfiniBand interconnect, to deliver the best application performance, scalability, and value. Azure HPC enables users to unlock innovation, productivity, and business agility, through a highly available range of HPC & AI technologies that can be dynamically allocated as your business and technical needs change. This learning path is a series of modules that help you get started on Azure HPC - you can choose topics you are most interested in or progress through each of them one by one.

lessons.title: Create, customize, and manage an HPC cluster in Azure with Azure CycleCloud
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure CycleCloud to create, customize, and manage high-performance computing (HPC) clusters in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-cyclecloud-high-performance-computing/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Create, customize, and manage an HPC cluster in Azure with Azure CycleCloud

lessons.title: Customize high-performance computing clusters deployed with Azure CycleCloud
lessons.content_md:
Azure CycleCloud templates offer a declarative provisioning model that helps you minimize administrative overhead associated with deploying and maintaining custom HPC environments in Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/customize-clusters-azure-cyclecloud/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Customize high-performance computing clusters deployed with Azure CycleCloud

lessons.title: Choose the best service level of Azure NetApp Files for your high-performance computing (HPC) applications
lessons.content_md:
Choose the best service level of Azure NetApp Files based on your throughput requirements and including cost considerations.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/choose-service-level-azure-netapp-files-hpc-applications/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Choose the best service level of Azure NetApp Files for your high-performance computing (HPC) applications

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Run high-performance computing (HPC) applications on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Run high-performance computing (HPC) applications on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
